bannerText: We use essential and analytics cookies to improve your experience. You can accept all or manage your preferences.
modalDescription: We use cookies to ensure the website works correctly and to analyze usage anonymously. Adjust your preferences below.
essentialDescription: Required for basic website functionality and security.
analyticsDescription: Collect anonymous data about website usage.
privacyNotice: You can review and change your cookie settings at any time via the 'Manage Cookie Preferences' link in the website footer.
